channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Iraq Prime Minister To Meet Trump In Washington Next Week
item.description: Zaidi, who came to power this year with Trump's blessing, assumed office amid growing US pressure on Baghdad to disarm pro-Iran armed groups that have frequently targeted US facilities in Iraq.
item.content:encoded: Zaidi, who came to power this year with Trump's blessing, assumed office amid growing US pressure on Baghdad to disarm pro-Iran armed groups that have frequently targeted US facilities in Iraq.

item.title: Self-Immolation, Protests: Youth-Backed Nepal Government Faces Gen-Z Fire

media:content.media:description: Protesters led by the Joint National Squatters Front face-off with the police in Kathmandu

item.description: This is the first major challenge against the government led by Prime Minister Balen Shah, who had supported the fierce Gen-Z protest last year that ended the reign of KP Sharma Oli and his team
item.content:encoded: This is the first major challenge against the government led by Prime Minister Balen Shah, who had supported the fierce Gen-Z protest last year that ended the reign of KP Sharma Oli and his team

item.title: How Russia Built A Spy Network In Heart Of Japan

media:content.media:description: Despite the allegations, Japan has shown clear support for Ukraine.

item.description: Ukrainian government estimates cited by the NYT suggest that around 90 per cent of Russian missiles and drones contain parts made in Japan.
item.content:encoded: Ukrainian government estimates cited by the NYT suggest that around 90 per cent of Russian missiles and drones contain parts made in Japan.

item.title: Trump Claims Hormuz Open To Commercial Ships After Iran Says It Was Closed

media:content.media:description: tehran had earlier said it had closed the Strait of Hormuz.

item.description: Trump's comments came after the latest US-Iran conflict in the Gulf.
item.content:encoded: Trump's comments came after the latest US-Iran conflict in the Gulf.

item.title: China Builds Full-Scale US Warship Replica For Missile Target Practice

media:content.media:description: The imagery showed a rail system measuring 6 metres in width with a ship-sized target installed.

item.description: The mock-up is reportedly being used for missile target practice and training.
item.content:encoded: The mock-up is reportedly being used for missile target practice and training.

item.title: US-Iran War Live Updates: US Military Says Traffic "Flowing" In Strait Of Hormuz

media:content.media:description: The US also revoked a sanctions waiver for Iranian oil.

item.description: Iran-US War News LIVE: The US military has hit a variety of military sites and port facilities after blaming Iran for targeting several merchant vessels off the coast of Oman, sparking Iranian fire then as well.
item.content:encoded: Iran-US War News LIVE: The US military has hit a variety of military sites and port facilities after blaming Iran for targeting several merchant vessels off the coast of Oman, sparking Iranian fire then as well.

item.title: "Irresponsible Acts": Oman Summons Iran Ambassador After Latest Attack

media:content.media:description: Oman has rarely accused Iran of attacking its territory. (Image for representation)

item.description: Oman has also issued a formal protest to the Iranian ambassador following an attack on the country, state media reported.
item.content:encoded: Oman has also issued a formal protest to the Iranian ambassador following an attack on the country, state media reported.

item.title: Ukraine's Zelensky Proposes Replacing Prime Minister In Government Reshuffle

media:content.media:description: Yulia Svyrydenko was appointed in July 2025.

item.description: Zelensky said the government changes were needed to "ensure the implementation of an updated political strategy", but gave no further details.
item.content:encoded: Zelensky said the government changes were needed to "ensure the implementation of an updated political strategy", but gave no further details.

item.title: Mystery Of Masked Man At Ali Khamenei's Funeral Finally Solved

media:content.media:description: Mojtaba has not made any public appearances or speeches.

item.description: A man wearing a black face mask and a black baseball cap was seen in the front row during the funeral prayers.
item.content:encoded: A man wearing a black face mask and a black baseball cap was seen in the front row during the funeral prayers.

item.title: Vietnam Police Arrest Captain After Speedboat Overturns, Killing 15 Indians

media:content.media:description: 15 Indians died in the Vietnam boat tragedy.

item.description: The incident occurred on Saturday as the boat carrying 32 Indian tourists, three Vietnamese crew members and a tour guide overturned in rough seas off May Rut Ngoai islet.
item.content:encoded: The incident occurred on Saturday as the boat carrying 32 Indian tourists, three Vietnamese crew members and a tour guide overturned in rough seas off May Rut Ngoai islet.

item.title: Bangladesh Terror Probe Exposes Martial Arts Organisation, Student Leader

media:content.media:description: The FCS brands itself as a martial arts and self-defence organization in Bangladesh

item.description: Students and instructors of Fatah Combat System (FCS), a martial arts training institution, have been arrested in the anti-terror probe in Bangladesh
item.content:encoded: Students and instructors of Fatah Combat System (FCS), a martial arts training institution, have been arrested in the anti-terror probe in Bangladesh

item.title: "Modern Times": Couples In Ecuador Get Married With Their Pets As Witnesses

media:content.media:description: Elsewhere in Latin America, only human witnesses are allowed.

item.description: With recently authorised "pet friendly" weddings, Ecuadoran officials are embracing the role of furry friends in modern families.
item.content:encoded: With recently authorised "pet friendly" weddings, Ecuadoran officials are embracing the role of furry friends in modern families.

item.title: Vietnam Boat Tragedy Updates: Vietnam Orders Probe After Boat Tragedy Kills 15 Indian Tourists

media:content.media:description: Vietnam Boat Tragedy: At least 15 Indians, including 13 men and 2 women, were killed in the incident

item.description: Vietnam Boat Tragedy Updates: The speedboat was ferrying 32 Indian tourists, three crew members and one Vietnamese tour guide from May Rut Ngoai Islet to An Thoi International Port
item.content:encoded: Vietnam Boat Tragedy Updates: The speedboat was ferrying 32 Indian tourists, three crew members and one Vietnamese tour guide from May Rut Ngoai Islet to An Thoi International Port

item.title: Former Qatar Emir Sheikh Hamad Bin Khalifa Al Thani Dies At 74

media:content.media:description: Sheikh Hamad had wide-ranging visions for Qatar's role as a diplomatic broker.

item.description: Sheikh Hamad, who stepped down in June 2013 after 18 years as emir, was the architect of energy-rich Qatar's stunning ambitions that turned it from a backwater into an international crossroads in less than a generation.
item.content:encoded: Sheikh Hamad, who stepped down in June 2013 after 18 years as emir, was the architect of energy-rich Qatar's stunning ambitions that turned it from a backwater into an international crossroads in less than a generation.

item.title: Lindsey Graham, A Leading Hawk On Iran War, Dies At 71 From 'Sudden Illness'

media:content.media:description: Lindsey Graham was a member of Donald Trump's Republican Party

item.description: Lindsey Graham was first elected to the United States Senate in 2002.
item.content:encoded: Lindsey Graham was first elected to the United States Senate in 2002.

item.title: Indian Missing, 10 Rescued After Iran Attacks Ship In Strait Of Hormuz

media:content.media:description: The Indian Embassy in Oman is closely monitoring the situation

item.description: India described the continued attacks on ships as deeply worrisome and called for an immediate de-escalation in the Middle East.
item.content:encoded: India described the continued attacks on ships as deeply worrisome and called for an immediate de-escalation in the Middle East.

item.title: Iran Shuts Hormuz After Attack On 'Unauthorised' Ship, US Begins New Strikes

media:content.media:description: US is demanding that Iran publicly state it will stop attacks on ships in the strait

item.description: Iran said the Strait of Hormuz was closed "until further notice" and until "the end of US interference in this region."
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1126233/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Iran said the Strait of Hormuz was closed "until further notice" and until "the end of US interference in this region."

item.title: Tourist Injured After Bison Tosses Him 8 Feet Into The Air At Yellowstone Park

media:content.media:description: The man was walking with his young grandson when the attack unfolded.

item.description: The bison hooked him with one of its horns and flung him high into the air before he landed heavily on the ground.
item.content:encoded: The bison hooked him with one of its horns and flung him high into the air before he landed heavily on the ground.

item.title: How Terrorist Groups Are Using AI To Plan Attacks And Make Bombs
item.description: Some terrorist groups, including Al Qaeda, Islamic State, and Boko Haram, are using AI tools to help plan attacks and make explosives.
item.content:encoded: Some terrorist groups, including Al Qaeda, Islamic State, and Boko Haram, are using AI tools to help plan attacks and make explosives.

item.title: "Scam Altman" vs "Elon Is Obsessed With Me": Musk And OpenAI CEO Clash Again

media:content.media:description: The latest exchange is part of a long-running public feud between Elon Musk and Sam Altman

item.description: Elon Musk, who co-founded OpenAI in 2015 before leaving the company, has repeatedly accused OpenAI of abandoning its original nonprofit mission.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1126425/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Elon Musk, who co-founded OpenAI in 2015 before leaving the company, has repeatedly accused OpenAI of abandoning its original nonprofit mission.
